channel.title: Network Optix — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Network Optix (nx).

item.title: CVE-2026-10056 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — CORS misconfiguration in Nx Witness VMS allows session token exfiltration via cross-origin request
item.description: CORS misconfiguration in the REST API of Network Optix Nx Witness VMS before version 6.1.2, when running in the default Standard security mode, on Linux and Windows allows an unauthenticated remote attacker to steal the session token of an authentica…

item.title: CVE-2023-6263 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️ — Server Spoofing Vulnerability in NxCloud
item.description: An issue was discovered by IPVM team in Network Optix NxCloud before 23.1.0.40440. It was possible to add a fake VMS server to NxCloud by using the exact identification of a legitimate VMS server. As result, it was possible to retrieve authorization…
